product_overview: A multi-workspace personal finance web app that offers Redis-backed email OTP authentication, a monthly financial dashboard, transaction ledger with inline editing, and exportable reports.
core_goals: Authenticate quickly and securely using an email 6-digit OTP to access a personal workspace.
Record, edit, and remove financial transactions with category and date metadata.
See a current-month financial overview (income vs expense) and drill into details.
Generate and export PDF/Excel reports for a selected date range showing category breakdowns.

features.name: Workspace Authentication (Email OTP)
features.description: Allow users to sign in or recover access using a 6-digit OTP sent to their email (OTP lifecycle and rate limit managed in Redis). Implementation and Redis-OTP details are documented in the spec (see pages 11–15 for the OTP flow and pages 14–16 for Redis/session architecture).
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Enter email address -> Request an OTP -> Enter 6-digit OTP -> Submit OTP -> Land on /dashboard and see the main overview
Navigate to /auth -> Enter email address -> Request an OTP -> Enter an incorrect or expired 6-digit OTP -> See a validation error prompting to retry or request a new code

features.name: Dashboard overview
features.description: Show the user's financial overview defaulting to the current month with summary cards and an income vs expense analyzer (dashboard design and mobile adaptations described on pages 2–3).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See default Current Month summary cards for Income, Expense, and Balance -> See Income vs Expense chart and top-level metrics
Navigate to /dashboard -> Change the time context to a different month -> Observe summary cards and charts update for the selected month
Navigate to /dashboard -> Open /dashboard/transactions -> Land on the transaction ledger to inspect individual entries

features.name: Transaction Management (create, edit, delete)
features.description: Create, edit, and delete transactions tied to a workspace with category typing, optimistic locking, and audit metadata. The transaction table, smart filters, and side-sliding edit drawer behavior are specified in the design notes (see pages 2–3).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/transactions -> Initiate a new transaction -> Select category and type -> Enter amount and date -> Save transaction -> See the new transaction appear in the ledger

Navigate to /dashboard/transactions -> Open an existing transaction for edit -> Modify category, amount, or date -> Save changes -> See the updated transaction and visible metadata (created/updated info)
Navigate to /dashboard/transactions -> Request to delete a transaction -> Confirm deletion intent -> See the transaction removed from the ledger
Navigate to /dashboard/transactions -> Initiate a new transaction -> Enter an invalid amount or leave a required field blank -> See client-side validation errors highlighting the incorrect fields

features.name: Financial Reporting & Export
features.description: Filterable reports with interactive previews and PDF/Excel export. The drill-down pie chart, A4 export layout, and export metadata requirements are described in the reports section (see pages 6–7 and the export engine notes on pages 14–15).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/reports -> Toggle date range filters to a desired period -> Observe the category distribution pie chart update for the selected range
Navigate to /dashboard/reports -> Drill into a category slice in the digital preview -> View subcategory breakdown and totals -> Return to the main chart view
Navigate to /dashboard/reports -> Apply filters and export to PDF or Excel -> Receive the generated file download (PDF/Excel) containing the pie chart and sorted summary table

routes.description: Transaction ledger with filters and editing

features.name: Workspace Authentication
features.description: Login using email and 6-digit OTP stored in Redis

features.name: Transaction Management
features.description: Create and manage financial transactions with optimistic locking

features.name: Financial Reporting
features.description: View spending patterns and export data

known_limitations.issue: Redis OTP depends on external service connectivity
known_limitations.impact: Auth fails if Redis is unreachable
